mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pw_campaign_template WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_campaign_template WHERE creator = #{creator} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_campaign_template (template_id, template_name, template_desc, default_duration_days, default_total_stock, default_max_participations, draw_mode, grant_type, status, creator, use_count) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{templateName}, #{templateDesc}, #{defaultDurationDays}, #{defaultTotalStock}, #{defaultMaxParticipations}, #{drawMode}, #{grantType}, #{status}, #{creator}, #{useCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE pw_campaign_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, template_desc = #{templateDesc}, default_duration_days = #{defaultDurationDays}, default_total_stock = #{defaultTotalStock}, default_max_participations = #{defaultMaxParticipations}, draw_mode = #{drawMode}, grant_type = #{grantType}, status = #{status} WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
UPDATE pw_campaign_template SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
